sections.paragraph: adv. emptily, Jerem. 14:3 (a) empty-handed, as poor men, Rth 3:17 hence שִׁלַּח רֵיקָם to send any one away empty, without a gift, Gen 31:42 Deu 15:13 Job 22:9. Deu 16:16, לֹא יֵרָאֶח אֶת־פְּנֵי יְיָ רֵיקָם “he shall not present himself before Jehovah without (bringing) a gift.”-(b) in vain, to no purpose, 2Sa 1:22.-(c) without cause, rashly, Psa 25:3 7:5 .
